stemHtml: An aircraft is flying a track of 255°(M), 22:54 UTC, it crosses radial 360° from a VOR station, 23:00 UTC, it crosses radial 330° from the same station. At 23:00 UTC, the distance between the aircraft and the station is:

options.a: greater than it was at 22:54 UTC
options.b: less than it was at 22:54 UTC
options.c: randomly different than it was at 22:54 UTC
options.d: the same as it was at 22:54 UTC
